verdicts.reasoning: fileClaim on bk_1002 returns clm_3001/hold_9002; reply reports the asset frozen and that the $2500 deposit cannot be refunded while the claim is open, inventing no id or amount.
addClaimEvidence attaches the field inspection report to the same claim clm_3001 (now under_review), not a second claim.
Declines to release, explains the investigatory hold is tied to open claim clm_3001 (under_review) and lifts only on resolveClaim; no releaseHold call frees the asset.
Calls placeHold on ast_boom01 this turn and confirms the asset is frozen without demanding a destructive-style two-step confirmation.
